title: Schedule
description: Manage working hours, blocked dates, and view the booking calendar.

availability.title: Working Hours
availability.description: Enable working days and set the time range, slot duration, and capacity for each day.
availability.loadError: Failed to load working hours. Try reloading the page.

blockedDates.title: Blocked Dates
blockedDates.description: Mark a date or date range as unavailable for booking (holidays, off-system events).
blockedDates.loadError: Failed to load blocked dates. Try reloading the page.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Blocked Date?
deleteDialog.desc: The block for {{tanggal}} will be removed and the slot on that date will become available again.

formDialog.title: Block Date
formDialog.desc: Choose a date or date range to block from booking.
formDialog.alasanPlaceholder: e.g. Personal day off, family event

toast.conflict: This date range has a confirmed booking. Move that booking before blocking this date.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: View working hours, blocked dates, and bookings by month.
calendar.loadError: Failed to load calendar. Try reloading the page.
